title: clang sign-compare compilation warning
body:
```
clang++  -m64 -std=c++17 ...
In file included from /usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_vcd_sc.h:26:
In file included from /usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_sc_trace.h:24:
In file included from /usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated.h:1023:
/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_funcs.h:1591:26: fatal error: comparison of integers of different signs: 'std::size_t' (aka 'unsigned long') and 'int' [-Wsign-compare]
    for (size_t i = 0; i < q.size(); ++i) ret |= static_cast<IData>(q.at(i)) << (i * lbits);
                       ~ ^ ~~~~~~~~
1 error generated.
```

env:
```
Linux flash 5.15.0-125-generic #135-Ubuntu SMP Fri Sep 27 13:53:58 UTC 2024 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux
Verilator 5.030 2024-10-27 rev v5.030
Ubuntu clang version 14.0.0-1ubuntu1.1
Target: x86_64-pc-linux-gnu
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /usr/bin
```
code_blocks:
clang++  -m64 -std=c++17 ...
In file included from /usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_vcd_sc.h:26:

/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_funcs.h:1591:26: fatal error: comparison of integers of different signs: 'std::size_t' (aka 'unsigned long') and 'int' [-Wsign-compare]
    for (size_t i = 0; i < q.size(); ++i) ret |= static_cast<IData>(q.at(i)) << (i * lbits);
                       ~ ^ ~~~~~~~~
1 error generated.
